should use ring color when progress is partial

evidence.testName: should render metric cards only for targets with value > 0

evidence.testName: should not delete goal when confirm returns false

assertions.title: Handles expired goal with negative days remaining

steps.observed: 'No Active Goal' text found in document; no crash or error

evidence.testOutput: PASS - expired goal handled gracefully, component falls back to no-goal state when updateGoalProgress returns null

assertions.title: Handles goal with all zero targets gracefully

Full test suite (426 tests across 19 suites) passes. Used jest.useFakeTimers for date-dependent tests with system time set to 2025-01-15.
